prompt_text:
### Demographics: 37-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 50.1 kg; Height 154.9 cm; BMI 20.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 111/62 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.1%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 10.0%; 3 months ago 10.5%; current 10.5%), FPG (12 months ago 255mg/dL; 9 months ago 225mg/dL; 6 months ago 275mg/dL; 3 months ago 298mg/dL; current 274mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 51.1kg; 9 months ago 51.2kg; 6 months ago 50.9kg; 3 months ago 49.3kg; current 50.1kg), Height (12 months ago 154.9cm; 9 months ago 154.9cm; 6 months ago 154.9cm; 3 months ago 154.9cm; current 154.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 20.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 111mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 64mmHg; 9 months ago 63mmHg; 6 months ago 64mmHg; 3 months ago 62mmHg; current 62mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 31U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 30U/L; 3 months ago 22U/L; current 27U/L), AST (12 months ago 10U/L; 9 months ago 10U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 10U/L; current 14U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 77mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 78mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 74mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 73mL/min/1.73m²; current 75mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 70mg/g; 9 months ago 54mg/g; 6 months ago 74mg/g; 3 months ago 67mg/g; current 57mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 81mg/dL; 9 months ago 86mg/dL; 6 months ago 82mg/dL; 3 months ago 85mg/dL; current 83mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 52mg/dL; 9 months ago 55mg/dL; 6 months ago 53mg/dL; 3 months ago 55mg/dL; current 54mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 124mg/dL; 9 months ago 147mg/dL; 6 months ago 129mg/dL; 3 months ago 129mg/dL; current 135mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.86 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
